paper.title: Precombustion CO2 Capture by Pressure Swing Adsorption (PSA): Comparison of Laboratory PSA Experiments and Simulations
supporting_sources_required_later: Casas et al. 2012 Adsorption breakthrough paper for pressure-changing implementation detail
Schell et al. 2012 Adsorption equilibrium paper if isotherm origin must be audited

geometry.provenance: Schell 2013 main paper Table 1 and setup text.

feed_and_process.regeneration_initial: vacuum at 150 degC for 8 h before first experiment

flow_rate_conversion_basis.pressurization_setpoint: same as adsorption; actual flow only approximately 20 cm3/s during changing pressure
flow_rate_conversion_basis.primary_conversion_assumption: actual volumetric flow at the step pressure and 298.15 K, converted by n_dot = P*Q/(R*T)
flow_rate_conversion_basis.why_primary_assumption: Main paper states that the adsorption feed molar flow changes depending on pressure; that is inconsistent with treating 20 cm3/s as a fixed standard volumetric flow without qualification.
flow_rate_conversion_basis.alternative_to_report: standard or near-atmospheric volumetric basis is not a second Schell source value; use only as an explicit sensitivity/diagnostic for gas-flow-unit ambiguity, not silently
flow_rate_conversion_basis.hard_warning: FLOW_BASIS remains an explicit uncertainty. A feed-pressure versus standard-pressure interpretation changes molar flow by approximately p_high / 1 bar. At 20 bar this is about a factor of 20, so the wrong choice should be apparent in inventory, thermal, pressure, or product-metric behaviour. Do not tune around this ambiguity.

feed_and_process.provenance: Schell 2013 main paper experimental procedure and Table 2.

directions.adsorption: bottom-up at p_high with H2-rich high-pressure product
directions.pressure_equalization: high-pressure column after adsorption connected to low-pressure column after purge until intermediate pressure; directions same as pressurization/blowdown
directions.blowdown: countercurrent to adsorption, from p_peq to p_low, CO2-rich low-pressure product
directions.purge: countercurrent to adsorption at p_low using equimolar CO2/H2 feed, not pure H2 purge
directions.pressurization: cocurrent with adsorption, from p_peq to p_high

cycle_steps.idle_steps: exist in two-column schedule and depend on step timing; preserve explicitly if scheduler requires them
cycle_steps.provenance: Schell 2013 Figure 2, Figure 3, and cycle-step text.

cycle_cases.target_role: pressure and temperature profile validation only; Table 2 has no purity/recovery metrics
central profile validation only as reported in first Table 2 block; performance metrics provided by case 5 for same timing
pressure and temperature profile validation only; Table 2 has no purity/recovery metrics

model_parameters.provenance: Schell 2013 main paper Table 3. K_L is fluid thermal conductivity for heat-transfer correlation, not an axial-dispersion coefficient.

anchor_cases.calculation_note: Independent calculation from Schell 2013 SI Table 2 equation and Table 3 parameters using R = 8.31446261815324 J/(mol K), p in Pa, T in K.
Independent calculation from Schell 2013 SI Table 2 equation and Table 3 parameters using R = 8.31446261815324 J/(mol K), p in Pa, T in K.
Independent calculation from Schell 2013 SI Table 2 equation and Table 3 parameters using R = 8.31446261815324 J/(mol K), p in Pa, T in K.
Independent calculation from Schell 2013 SI Table 2 equation and Table 3 parameters using R = 8.31446261815324 J/(mol K), p in Pa, T in K.
Independent calculation from Schell 2013 SI Table 2 equation and Table 3 parameters using R = 8.31446261815324 J/(mol K), p in Pa, T in K.
Independent calculation from Schell 2013 SI Table 2 equation and Table 3 parameters using R = 8.31446261815324 J/(mol K), p in Pa, T in K.

isotherm.provenance: Schell 2013 SI Table 2 equation and SI Table 3 parameters.

pressure_boundary_reproduction_details.default_mode: do not use these forms in toPSAil-native mode unless a labelled Schell reproduction mode is explicitly authorised
pressure_boundary_reproduction_details.p_peq_note: Intermediate equalization pressure is not given as a table parameter. Do not invent it; use native equalization. Do not reproduce Schell/Casas pressure-changing mechanics unless a future explicit instruction pack authorises a labelled mode.
pressure_boundary_reproduction_details.provenance: Schell 2013 modeling section and pressure equalization discussion.

piping_diagnostics.note: Piping and stagnant tank are detector/composition-profile diagnostics. They should not be blended into default table-performance validation.

performance_calculation.basis: H2-rich product measured during adsorption; CO2-rich product calculated by subtraction from component feed inventory
steps: Integrate MFC feed rates over pressurization, adsorption, and purge for each column.
Calculate H2-rich product flow from rotameter reading, product composition, density, and calibration.
Integrate component-specific H2-rich product rates over adsorption.
Calculate CO2-rich product component amounts by subtraction.
Average over two columns and three process loops, giving six values.

hard_checks: mole fractions finite and within tolerance of [0,1]
validation_policy.soft_performance_band_policy: report-only at first; classify in_band if within published +/- uncertainty, near_band if within 2x uncertainty, out_of_band otherwise; never tune in the same task
validation_policy.temperature_profile_policy: primary qualitative/profile validation target; agents should present relevant source/profile files or excerpts to the project owner for manual review and must not digitize curves unless explicitly instructed
validation_policy.composition_profile_policy: treat MS profiles cautiously because source shows piping/detector distortion

unresolved_assumptions.proposed_handling: use primary conversion assumption first; keep the standard-volume interpretation labelled as an uncertainty/sensitivity and report large diagnostic evidence before changing basis

unresolved_assumptions.risk: pressure equalization cannot be exactly reproduced from Table 2 alone
unresolved_assumptions.proposed_handling: native equalization first; do not reproduce Schell/Casas pressure-changing mechanics unless a future explicit instruction pack authorises a labelled mode

unresolved_assumptions.risk: toPSAil native runner is Excel/example driven and Linux getExcelParams errors
unresolved_assumptions.proposed_handling: perform SCHELL-05 strategy review before native scaffold; prefer wrappers around simulator entry points wherever practical

unresolved_assumptions.risk: native extended Langmuir-Freundlich is not Schell SI Sips
unresolved_assumptions.proposed_handling: intentional design choice is optional core Sips integration without changing default behaviour; before editing core, alert the project owner that a dedicated implementation plan is needed

unresolved_assumptions.risk: profile validation thresholds cannot be hard from undigitized paper curves
unresolved_assumptions.proposed_handling: initial soft report includes qualitative/profile diagnostics; present relevant source/profile files or excerpts to the project owner for manual examination rather than digitizing by default
